name: quickpic
title: QuickPic
description: Save images under keywords and paste them as files into any app.
author: antkuznetsov

commands.name: library
commands.title: QuickPic Library
commands.description: Search saved images and paste them as files

commands.name: add-image
commands.title: Add Image
commands.description: Import an image from a local path with keywords

commands.name: add-selected-image
commands.title: Add Selected Finder Image
commands.description: Import the selected Finder image with keywords
